name: character-witness
description: Detect, highlight, diagnose, and optionally auto-replace non-ASCII characters in your files.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Auto-replace on save, the replacement map, and ignored-paths globs are disabled in untrusted workspaces. Detection, highlighting, and diagnostics continue to work.

commands.title: Character Witness: Add to Allowed Characters
Character Witness: Go to Next Non-ASCII Character

characterWitness.enable.description: Enable or disable the Character Witness extension.

characterWitness.decoration.description: Customize the visual style of highlighted non-ASCII characters.

characterWitness.allowedCharacters.description: Characters to ignore (will not be highlighted or diagnosed). Accepts individual entries ("u+00a3") or ranges ("u+2500 - u+2505").

characterWitness.autoReplaceOnSave.markdownDescription: Automatically replace non-ASCII characters when saving a file. Replacement characters are defined in the **replacementMap** setting.

characterWitness.replacementMap.markdownDescription:
Map of non-ASCII characters to their ASCII replacements. To be used with the **autoReplaceOnSave** setting.

Keys accept a single code point (`"u+2013"`), a range (`"u+2013 - u+2015"`), a comma-separated list (`"u+2018, u+2019"`), or a combination (`"u+2013 - u+2015, u+2018"`).

characterWitness.severityOverrides.description: Override the diagnostic severity for specific characters.

characterWitness.includeStrings.description: Whether to flag non-ASCII characters inside string literals. When false, characters within strings are ignored. Note: detection is regex-based; regex literals (/pattern/), Python f-/raw-strings, and here-docs may not be classified correctly.

characterWitness.includeComments.description: Whether to flag non-ASCII characters inside comments. When false, characters within comments are ignored. Note: detection is regex-based; some language constructs may not be classified correctly.

characterWitness.diagnosticSeverities.description: Which severity levels are shown in the Problems panel. Remove levels to suppress those diagnostics while keeping decorations. Use [] to disable all diagnostics.

characterWitness.codePointFormat.description: How code points are displayed in hover text, diagnostics, and notifications. Also controls the format written to settings when using 'Add to Allowed Characters'.

characterWitness.codePointCase.description: Whether hex digits (and the 'u+' prefix) are displayed in lower or uppercase.

characterWitness.ignoredPaths.description: Array of glob patterns matched against the file's full path (forward slashes, cross-platform). Files with a matching path are excluded from scanning, decorations, diagnostics, and auto-replace.

characterWitness.maxFileSizeKb.description: Maximum document size (in KB, measured in UTF-16 code units) to scan and auto-replace. Files larger than this are skipped to protect responsiveness on large inputs. Set to 0 to disable the limit.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run generate && npm run compile
